mapper.select: SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, v.vol_phone, a.act_title FROM ENROLLMENT e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.enroll_id = #{enrollId}
SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM ENROLLMENT e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.vol_id = #{volId} AND e.act_id = #{actId}
SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM ENROLLMENT e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.vol_id = #{volId} ORDER BY e.enroll_time DESC

SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, v.vol_phone, a.act_title FROM ENROLLMENT e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.act_id = #{actId} ORDER BY e.enroll_time
SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, v.vol_phone, a.act_title FROM ENROLLMENT e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id ORDER BY e.enroll_time DESC

SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM ENROLLMENT e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.enroll_status = #{enrollStatus} ORDER BY e.enroll_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ENROLLMENT(vol_id, act_id, enroll_reason) VALUES(#{volId}, #{actId}, #{enrollReason})
mapper.update: UPDATE ENROLLMENT SET enroll_reason = #{enrollReason}, enroll_status = #{enrollStatus}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark} WHERE enroll_id = #{enrollId}
UPDATE ENROLLMENT SET enroll_status = #{enrollStatus}, audit_time = NOW(), audit_remark = #{auditRemark} WHERE enroll_id = #{enrollId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ENROLLMENT WHERE act_id = #{actId} AND enroll_status IN (0, 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ENROLLMENT WHERE vol_id = #{volId}
